description.title: Description
description.html:
• Sourced from : Coastal Farms of Pollachi
  • Flavour Profile : The clean, crisp Pollachi flavor - The classic, hydrating coconut water flavor with subtle nutty or mineral undertones. The flesh (malai) is delicate and mild.
  • Texture Profile : Water - Light and extremely hydrating, Flesh (Malai) - Extremely tender, gelatinous, and easily scoopable with a spoon.
description.text: Sourced from : Coastal Farms of PollachiFlavour Profile : The clean, crisp Pollachi flavor - The classic, hydrating coconut water flavor with subtle nutty or mineral undertones. The flesh (malai) is delicate and mild.Texture Profile : Water - Light and extremely hydrating, Flesh (Malai) - Extremely tender, gelatinous, and easily scoopable with a spoon.
